description: Low-cut styling on a classic suede boot, this pair from woodland is set to become your mainstay while braving the great outdoors. Crafted in two-tone suede, with colour block styling, this shoe is a closet staple. Aggressive outsole with lugs, D-ring eyelets and tough overlays make this an adventurer's sartorial dream. Wear these with your cargo shorts or military pants and your favourite polo T-shirt.UpperTwo-tone leather upper with strategically placed overlaysFour-hole lace ups with D-ring metal eyeletsPadded tonguePull loop at the heel for ease of wearPadded insole for in-step comfortMidsoleRubber midsole for cushioned comfortOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and traction, a curved midfoot and a raised heelOutsole reinforced onto the upper as a toe guardShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
